transcript.speaker: Olympia McNerney
transcript.title: Global Head of Investor Relations
transcript.content: Welcome to IBM's first quarter 2024 earnings presentation. We will review our quarter and then move to guidance and Q&A.

transcript.speaker: Arvind Krishna
transcript.title: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer
transcript.content: Demand for AI and hybrid cloud remained healthy. We expect to deliver revenue growth and continue to execute against our full-year outlook.

transcript.speaker: Jim Kavanaugh
transcript.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
transcript.content: Margins benefited from software mix and productivity. We remain mindful of macro pressure in some consulting decisions.

transcript.speaker: Operator
transcript.content: We will now begin the question-and-answer session. Our first question comes from Amit Daryanani.

transcript.speaker: Amit Daryanani
transcript.title: Evercore ISI
transcript.content: Can you comment on the demand outlook and whether macro uncertainty changes your second-half guidance?
